seoTitle: Rivotek Products | Intelligent Computing & AIoT Solutions | LiTong Distributor
seoDescription: Explore Rivotek product portfolio including intelligent computing platforms, AIOS, AI hardware solutions, and automotive intelligent systems. Authorized distributor with technical support.

faqs.question: What are the main product categories offered by Rivotek?
faqs.answer: Rivotek offers four main product categories: (1) Intelligent Computing Platform - high-performance computing platforms integrating multi-core processors, NPU, ISP, and codec for AIoT applications; (2) AI Operating System (Zhiwei AIOS) - full-stack software solutions from底层drivers to upper-layer applications; (3) AI Hardware Solutions - complete AI hardware including edge computing devices, smart cameras, and intelligent sensors; (4) Automotive Intelligent Systems - smart cockpit, intelligent driving, and domain controller solutions. Each category includes multiple series optimized for specific performance requirements and operating environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Review each product category to find the Rivotek solution matching your application requirements.

faqs.question: How do I select the right Rivotek computing platform for my application?
faqs.answer: Selecting the right Rivotek computing platform depends on your application requirements: (1) For mobile and consumer devices - choose platforms with high-performance CPU, GPU, and power efficiency; (2) For AI edge devices - select platforms with dedicated NPU for on-device AI inference; (3) For automotive applications - choose AEC-Q100 qualified platforms with functional safety support; (4) For industrial IoT - select platforms with wide temperature range and industrial reliability. Key parameters to consider include processing power, AI performance (TOPS), power consumption, interface options, and temperature range. Contact LiTong FAE for detailed selection guidance and reference designs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Match the computing platform to your processing requirements, AI needs, and operating environment.

faqs.question: What are the key features of Rivotek Zhiwei AIOS?
faqs.answer: Rivotek Zhiwei AIOS features: (1) Full-stack architecture - comprehensive software stack from底层drivers to upper-layer applications; (2) AI framework support - integrated AI frameworks for easy model deployment; (3) Hardware abstraction - unified APIs for different hardware platforms; (4) Security features - built-in security mechanisms for secure boot and data protection; (5) Connectivity support - comprehensive network and wireless connectivity options; (6) Development tools - complete SDK and development environment; (7) Customization - flexible customization options for specific applications. Zhiwei AIOS is designed to accelerate intelligent product development and reduce time-to-market.
faqs.decisionGuide: Consider Zhiwei AIOS for rapid intelligent product development with comprehensive software support.

faqs.question: How do Rivotek automotive solutions compare to competitors?
faqs.answer: Rivotek automotive solutions offer competitive advantages: (1) Integrated approach - complete smart cockpit and intelligent driving solutions from single vendor; (2) Cost-performance - high-performance solutions at competitive prices compared to established automotive suppliers; (3) Local support - rapid technical support from Rivotek and LiTong engineering teams; (4) Customization - flexible customization for specific OEM requirements; (5) Ecosystem - integration with major Chinese automotive OEMs including SAIC and Voyah; (6) Innovation - latest AI and connectivity technologies for next-generation vehicles. Rivotek's solutions are particularly strong in the Chinese automotive market with proven deployments.
faqs.decisionGuide: Rivotek automotive solutions offer excellent integration and local support for Chinese automotive market.

faqs.question: What is the quality and reliability of Rivotek products?
faqs.answer: Rivotek maintains high quality and reliability standards: (1) Design quality - rigorous design verification and validation processes; (2) Manufacturing - partnership with leading foundries and manufacturing partners; (3) Testing - comprehensive testing including functional, performance, and reliability testing; (4) Automotive certification - IATF 16949 quality management and ISO 26262 functional safety compliance; (5) Traceability - full lot traceability for quality tracking; (6) Field proven - successful deployments with major customers including Xiaomi, vivo, DJI, SAIC, and Voyah. Rivotek's quality management system ensures products meet the stringent requirements of consumer, automotive, and industrial applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Rivotek products meet industry-standard quality and reliability requirements for diverse applications.

categories.name: Intelligent Computing Platform
categories.description: Rivotek intelligent computing platforms provide high-performance processing solutions for AIoT applications. The portfolio includes multi-core processors with integrated NPU, ISP, and codec, designed for mobile devices, AI hardware, automotive systems, and industrial applications. These platforms deliver powerful AI inference capabilities, high-quality image processing, and efficient video encoding/decoding.

selectionGuide.title: How to Select Rivotek Computing Platform
selectionGuide.description: Comprehensive guide to selecting the right computing platform for your AIoT application

faqs.question: What is the difference between Rivotek computing platforms?
faqs.answer: Rivotek offers different computing platform series optimized for various applications: (1) Mobile series - high-performance with power efficiency for smartphones and tablets; (2) AI series - dedicated NPU for edge AI applications; (3) Automotive series - AEC-Q100 qualified with functional safety; (4) Industrial series - wide temperature range and high reliability. Each series offers different combinations of CPU cores, NPU performance, and interface options to match specific application requirements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose mobile series for consumer devices, AI series for edge inference, automotive series for vehicles.

faqs.question: How do I evaluate NPU performance for my AI application?
faqs.answer: NPU performance evaluation involves several factors: (1) TOPS rating - theoretical peak operations per second; (2) Real-world inference latency - actual time for your specific model; (3) Power efficiency - TOPS per watt for battery-powered devices; (4) Model support - compatibility with your AI framework and model format; (5) Memory bandwidth - affects data movement efficiency. Rivotek platforms provide detailed benchmark data for common AI models. Contact LiTong FAE for performance evaluation support and benchmark results for your specific use case.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate NPU based on real-world latency for your model, not just TOPS rating.

faqs.question: What development tools are available for Rivotek platforms?
faqs.answer: Rivotek provides comprehensive development tools: (1) SDK - software development kit with drivers, libraries, and APIs; (2) AI tools - model conversion, optimization, and deployment tools; (3) IDE support - integration with popular development environments; (4) Debug tools - debugging and profiling utilities; (5) Reference designs - proven hardware designs and software examples; (6) Documentation - detailed technical documentation and application notes. LiTong provides additional support including training, technical consultation, and design review services.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use Rivotek SDK and AI tools for efficient development and deployment.

faqs.question: How do I optimize power consumption for battery-powered devices?
faqs.answer: Power optimization strategies for Rivotek platforms: (1) Dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) - adjust CPU/NPU frequency based on workload; (2) Power gating - disable unused hardware blocks; (3) Sleep modes - utilize low-power sleep states when idle; (4) AI model optimization - quantize and prune models to reduce computation; (5) Display optimization - reduce refresh rate and resolution when possible; (6) Peripheral management - disable unused interfaces. Rivotek platforms provide hardware and software mechanisms for power management. Contact LiTong FAE for power optimization guidance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use DVFS, power gating, and sleep modes to optimize battery life.

faqs.question: What thermal management is required for Rivotek platforms?
faqs.answer: Thermal management requirements depend on application: (1) Passive cooling - sufficient for low-power applications with adequate PCB copper area; (2) Active cooling - heatsink or fan required for high-performance sustained workloads; (3) Thermal interface material - use high-quality TIM between chip and heatsink; (4) PCB design - adequate copper area and thermal vias for heat dissipation; (5) Software throttling - implement thermal throttling to prevent overheating. Rivotek provides thermal design guidelines and simulation support. Maximum junction temperature is typically 105°C for consumer and 125°C for automotive grades.
faqs.decisionGuide: Design adequate thermal solution based on power dissipation and ambient temperature.

products.name: High-Performance AI Computing Platform
products.shortDescription: Octa-core AI computing platform with 4 TOPS NPU, supporting 4K video and multi-camera input for intelligent devices a...
descriptionParagraphs: The RV1000 is a high-performance intelligent computing platform designed for demanding AIoT applications. It features an octa-core CPU architecture combined with a dedicated 4 TOPS NPU for efficient AI inference.

With integrated high-performance ISP supporting up to 48MP camera input and 4K video codec, the RV1000 enables advanced computer vision applications. The platform supports multiple display outputs and rich connectivity options.
The RV1000 is available in both consumer and automotive grades, making it suitable for smart devices, intelligent vehicles, and industrial applications requiring high-performance AI processing.
features: Dedicated 4 TOPS NPU for AI acceleration

faeReview.author: Michael Chen
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - AI & Embedded Systems
faeReview.content: The RV1000 is an impressive platform that I've successfully deployed in multiple customer projects. In my experience, the 4 TOPS NPU delivers excellent performance for real-time object detection and facial recognition applications. I particularly appreciate the integrated ISP which eliminates the need for external image processing chips, reducing BOM cost and complexity. The automotive grade option with AEC-Q100 qualification opens up significant opportunities in the growing smart cockpit market. One key recommendation: pay attention to thermal design as the platform can generate significant heat under sustained AI workloads. With proper heatsinking, customers can achieve reliable operation even in challenging automotive environments.
faeReview.highlight: Powerful AI platform ideal for smart cockpit and edge AI applications

alternativeParts.reason: Higher AI performance and video resolution, established ecosystem
alternativeParts.useCase: Applications requiring >4 TOPS AI performance or 8K video

alternativeParts.reason: Established AI ecosystem with CUDA support
alternativeParts.useCase: Development and prototyping requiring NVIDIA ecosystem

companionParts.description: Dedicated PMIC for RV1000 power management
64GB eMMC storage for system and data

faqs.question: What is the typical power consumption of RV1000?
faqs.answer: RV1000 power consumption varies by workload: (1) Idle mode - 500mW typical with display off; (2) Light load - 1-2W for basic UI and connectivity; (3) AI inference - 3-5W depending on model complexity; (4) Peak performance - up to 8W under maximum CPU and NPU load; (5) Video playback - 2-3W for 4K decoding. Power consumption can be optimized through DVFS, power gating, and workload management. The platform supports multiple power domains for granular control. For battery-powered applications, typical battery life ranges from 4-8 hours depending on usage patterns and battery capacity.
faqs.decisionGuide: Expect 3-5W typical for AI applications; use power management features to optimize battery life.

faqs.question: What AI frameworks are supported on RV1000?
faqs.answer: RV1000 supports major AI frameworks: (1) TensorFlow Lite - optimized for edge deployment with quantization support; (2) ONNX Runtime - cross-platform model deployment; (3) Rivotek AI SDK - proprietary SDK with model conversion tools; (4) Android NNAPI - for Android-based applications; (5) Custom operators - ability to implement custom NPU operators. The NPU supports INT8 and FP16 precision for efficient inference. Model conversion tools are provided to optimize and quantize models for the NPU. Most common CNN architectures are supported including ResNet, MobileNet, YOLO, and custom architectures.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use TensorFlow Lite or ONNX for broad compatibility; Rivotek SDK for maximum performance.

faqs.question: How do I interface cameras with RV1000?
faqs.answer: RV1000 provides flexible camera interfaces: (1) MIPI CSI-2 - up to 4 lanes supporting high-resolution sensors; (2) DVP parallel interface - for lower resolution or legacy sensors; (3) ISP integration - built-in image signal processor with advanced features; (4) Multi-camera support - up to 4 simultaneous camera inputs; (5) Interface types - support for RAW, YUV, and RGB formats. The ISP provides features including auto exposure, auto white balance, noise reduction, and HDR. Reference designs are available for common camera modules. Contact LiTong FAE for camera selection and interface design support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use MIPI CSI-2 for high-resolution cameras; DVP for cost-sensitive designs.

faqs.question: What is the software development flow for RV1000?
faqs.answer: RV1000 software development flow: (1) Setup - install SDK and development tools on Linux host; (2) Board bring-up - verify hardware with provided firmware; (3) Driver development - customize drivers for specific hardware; (4) Application development - develop applications using provided APIs; (5) AI model deployment - convert and optimize models using AI tools; (6) System integration - integrate all components and optimize performance; (7) Testing - comprehensive testing including functional and performance; (8) Production - deploy to production devices. Rivotek provides Android and Linux BSP options. LiTong offers training and technical support throughout the development process.
faqs.decisionGuide: Follow the SDK setup guide and use reference designs as starting point.

faqs.question: Does RV1000 support automotive functional safety?
faqs.answer: Yes, RV1000 automotive grade supports functional safety: (1) AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification -40°C to +105°C; (2) ISO 26262 compliance - ASIL-B support for safety-critical functions; (3) Lock-step CPUs - redundant processing for safety-critical tasks; (4) ECC memory - error correction for data integrity; (5) Watchdog timers - system monitoring and recovery; (6) Safe monitoring - dedicated safety monitor for critical functions. The platform provides safety manual and FMEDA documentation for automotive system design. Contact LiTong for automotive safety documentation and design support.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use automotive grade RV1000 for safety-critical applications requiring ISO 26262 compliance.

products.name: Mid-Range AI Computing Platform
products.shortDescription: Quad-core AI computing platform with 2 TOPS NPU, optimized for cost-sensitive AIoT devices and smart cameras.
descriptionParagraphs: The RV500 is a cost-optimized intelligent computing platform designed for mainstream AIoT applications. It features a quad-core CPU with integrated 2 TOPS NPU for efficient AI processing.

Supporting 1080p video processing and multi-camera input, the RV500 is ideal for smart cameras, access control devices, and industrial inspection systems. The platform balances performance and cost for mass-market applications.
With low power consumption and compact package, the RV500 enables battery-powered and space-constrained designs. The platform is available in industrial temperature grade for harsh environments.
features: 2 TOPS NPU for edge AI applications

faeReview.author: David Liu
faeReview.title: Principal FAE - Edge AI
faeReview.content: The RV500 hits a sweet spot for cost-sensitive AI applications. In my experience with smart camera projects, the 2 TOPS NPU is sufficient for face detection, people counting, and basic object recognition while keeping BOM cost competitive. The 1080p video capability meets most surveillance and monitoring needs. I particularly like the compact package which enables small form factor designs. Power consumption is excellent - I've seen designs run for days on battery power with proper optimization. The industrial temperature grade option is valuable for outdoor and industrial applications. For customers needing AI capabilities without the cost of high-end platforms, the RV500 is my first recommendation.
faeReview.highlight: Cost-effective AI platform ideal for smart cameras and edge devices

alternativeParts.useCase: Applications requiring >2 TOPS AI or 4K video

companionParts.description: PMIC optimized for RV500 power requirements

faqs.question: What is the price difference between RV500 and RV1000?
faqs.answer: The RV500 is positioned as a cost-optimized solution with approximately 40-50% lower price compared to RV1000. The exact pricing depends on volume and configuration. RV500 targets high-volume applications where cost is critical while still requiring AI capabilities. RV1000 is for premium applications requiring higher performance. Contact LiTong sales for specific pricing based on your volume requirements and configuration needs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose RV500 for cost-sensitive high-volume applications; RV1000 for premium performance.

faqs.question: Can RV500 run complex AI models?
faqs.answer: RV500 can run many common AI models with its 2 TOPS NPU: (1) Face detection - real-time performance with high accuracy; (2) Object classification - support for 1000+ classes; (3) People detection - reliable detection for security applications; (4) License plate recognition - OCR for access control; (5) Simple pose estimation - basic gesture recognition. Complex models like large object detection networks may require model optimization or quantization. The Rivotek AI SDK provides tools to optimize models for the NPU. For very complex models, consider the RV1000 with 4 TOPS.
faqs.decisionGuide: RV500 handles common AI tasks well; use RV1000 for complex multi-model applications.

products.name: High-Performance Edge AI Processor
products.shortDescription: Octa-core edge AI processor with 8 TOPS NPU, supporting 8K video and advanced ISP for premium AI applications.
descriptionParagraphs: The RV2000 is a high-performance edge AI processor designed for demanding applications requiring superior AI and video capabilities.
It features an octa-core CPU with 8 TOPS NPU and supports 8K video processing for premium edge AI devices.
The advanced ISP and rich connectivity make it ideal for high-end smart cameras, NVRs, and AI gateways.

faeReview.author: Robert Zhang
faeReview.title: Principal FAE - High-Performance Computing
faeReview.content: The RV2000 delivers exceptional performance for demanding edge AI applications. The 8 TOPS NPU handles complex multi-model inference with ease. I've deployed this in high-end NVR systems processing 16+ camera streams with real-time AI analytics. The 8K video capability is impressive and the 8nm process delivers excellent power efficiency. The advanced ISP produces stunning image quality even in challenging lighting. For customers needing top-tier edge AI performance, the RV2000 is the clear choice.
faeReview.highlight: Premium edge AI performance for demanding applications

products.name: Ultra-Low-Power AI Processor
products.shortDescription: Dual-core ultra-low-power AI processor with 0.5 TOPS NPU for battery-powered AI devices and sensors.
descriptionParagraphs: The RV300 is an ultra-low-power AI processor designed for battery-operated devices requiring always-on AI capabilities.
It features a dual-core CPU with 0.5 TOPS NPU and exceptional power efficiency for extended battery life.
The processor is ideal for smart sensors, wearables, and battery-powered cameras requiring AI at the edge.

faeReview.author: Lisa Park
faeReview.title: FAE - Low Power AI
faeReview.content: The RV300 enables AI on battery-powered devices like never before. The power consumption is incredibly low - I've seen designs run for months on small batteries. The 0.5 TOPS is sufficient for person detection, voice recognition, and other always-on applications. The compact QFN package is perfect for space-constrained designs. For battery-powered AI, this processor is a game-changer.
faeReview.highlight: Ultra-low power for battery AI devices

faqs.question: What is included in Zhiwei AIOS?
faqs.answer: Zhiwei AIOS includes: (1) BSP - board support package with drivers; (2) AI framework - integrated AI runtime and tools; (3) Middleware - connectivity, security, and system services; (4) Applications - reference applications and demos; (5) Development tools - SDK, IDE integration, and debugging tools.
faqs.decisionGuide: AIOS provides complete software stack for rapid development.

products.name: Zhiwei AIOS Standard Edition

It includes full AI framework support, hardware abstraction layer, and comprehensive development tools.
The Standard Edition supports major AI frameworks including TensorFlow Lite and ONNX Runtime.

faeReview.author: Sarah Chen
faeReview.title: FAE - Software Solutions
faeReview.content: AIOS Standard Edition provides everything needed for AI product development. The integrated AI framework saves significant development time.

The Automotive Edition supports smart cockpit, ADAS, and domain controller applications.

faeReview.author: Michael Wang
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Automotive

products.name: Zhiwei AIOS Edge Edition

It provides essential AI capabilities with minimal memory and storage footprint.
The Edge Edition is ideal for battery-powered sensors and low-cost IoT devices.

faeReview.author: Lisa Park

faeReview.author: David Liu
faeReview.title: Senior FAE - Enterprise
faeReview.content: AIOS Enterprise Edition provides the management and security features needed for large deployments. The cloud integration is seamless.

faqs.question: What automotive solutions does Rivotek offer?
faqs.answer: Rivotek offers: (1) Smart cockpit - integrated infotainment and instrument cluster; (2) Intelligent driving - ADAS and autonomous driving platforms; (3) Domain controllers - centralized vehicle compute platforms; (4) Gateway - secure vehicle networking solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select based on functional requirements and safety level needed.

products.name: RV Smart Cockpit X1

It supports multiple high-resolution displays including central control, instrument cluster, and passenger entertainment.
The platform integrates navigation, media, voice control, and vehicle information in a unified experience.

faeReview.author: Robert Zhang

faeReview.author: Jennifer Liu
faeReview.title: FAE - Automotive Security
faeReview.content: Secure Gateway S1 provides comprehensive security for vehicle networks. The hardware security module is essential.
